feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: download flight data in eclipse from github
entry.content:
abap-platform-refscen-flight/README.md at ABAP-platform-cloud · SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight · GitHub referencing this document but facing errors while activating the packages.

Can someone please help with this?

entry.title: How to make Quick View in sap rap eclipse?
entry.content: "Is it possible to display a QuickView with the user's email and phone number when hovering over or clicking on the 'Created By' field on the Object Page?

entry.title: Seeking Guidance: UI State Persistence in RAP Unmanaged Query after Intent-Based Navigation
entry.content:
I’m currently working on a custom application using an Unmanaged RAP Query where we’ve implemented Intent-Based Navigation (IBN) to various standard SAP apps.

While the forward navigation works as expected, we are encountering an issue with the "Return" flow. When navigating back from the standard app to our custom RAP app, the UI state is lost—the filters are cleared, and the previously queried data is gone. It behaves as a fresh launch rather than a return to the previous state.

Standard SAP apps typically maintain this context (Pagination/Filter selections) via Inner App State or Selection Variant persistence.

Could anyone provide insight on how to properly implement state handling in an Unmanaged RAP context? Specifically:

  1. Are there specific annotations or manifest settings required to enable Component/UI State persistence?

  2. Does the Unmanaged Query require a specific implementation to "re-read" the navigation context upon return?

Looking forward to your expert advice!

Best regards,

Rowie

entry.title: SAP RAP - fields of root and child on one object page
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a simple managed RAP-Scenarion with a BO containing the follwing Entities:

  • Root entity (e.g. Invoice)
  • One Child Entity  (e.g. Position)
  • Cardianality is [1..*]

When I start the Application, I can click on create and enter the Data for the Root-Node. After that, I can click on create again and entert he data fort he child. So far, so good. This is the standard behavior the RAP Framework offers.

 

I’m wondering if it is possible, to create a managed scenarion with an Object Page, where all Fields of the Root and the Child are displayed all at once.

I found a solution here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/create-by-association-for-1-1-composition-in-rap-unmanaged/qaq-p/14006338. But after implementing, the fields of the child are shown in a second facet on the same screen as the root entity. But the fields are not editable. I think this is because of the cardinality I used in my example. The cardinality in the mentioned link between root and child is 0..1.

 

Thank you for any hints, tricks …

 

BR

 

Peter

entry.title: ABAP RAP - Action is not Updating the UI (unmanaged / managed)
entry.content:
Hello Community

I am currently trying to fill a field with a different value using an action. To do this, I create a READ entity to determine the selected rows, then I change the field and return it using the Result statement.

Unfortunately, the UI is not updated so that the new value appears in the column.

I have stored my action as follows:
action load result [1] $self;

My action method looks like this:

READ ENTITIES OF XXXX IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY YYYYY
FROM CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT DATA(lt_rows)
FAILED failed.

LOOP AT lt_rows ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<row>).
<row>-FIELD1 = ‘NEW_TEXT’.
<row>-FIELD2 = ‘NEW TEXT 2’.
INSERT VALUE #( %tky = <row>-%tky %param = <row> ) INTO TABLE result.
ENDLOOP.

Regardless of whether I try it in a managed or unmanaged environment, it does not work. Could someone assist me in identifying what the problem might be?

Update: I did some debugging today and found out that the odata call is always triggered and overwrite my changed result!
But how can i prevent this?

Current system is SAP S4HANA 2023 FP03.

Best regards, Wolfgang

entry.title: Make field read-only in table but editable in Object Page
entry.content:
I have a custom app where in the Object Page, there is section for a table where i can add new business partner.

But I want the fields to be read-only when it is viewed as a table in the Object Page.

I want it to be editable when I access the row into another the BP Object Page.

I already tried using dynamic feature control, but the logic cannot tell whether the app is in table view or in object page view. Need your help on this matter. Thanks!

entry.title: While creating QN attachment in API I am getting the authorization error
entry.content:
I have successfully posted the Quality Notification via API IN PUBLIC CLOUD. After creation while trying to create an attachment in Quality Notification using API /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet, I am getting authorization error. I have used the system credentials SAP_COM_0153 (which is used for QN).

Kindly help me in resolving this issue

entry.title: RAP‑Based Service Does Not Support Aggregation Totals with Filters and Group‑By with Crud
entry.content:
Problem Description:

We are implementing a Fiori Elements List Report using a RAP‑based OData service (OData V2 or V4).
The business requirement is to show aggregated totals (SUM) for multiple numeric columns. These totals must update dynamically whenever:

  • Filters are applied
  • Group By is enabled
  • Group levels expand/collapse
  • Sorting or table personalization is applied

Most Important Requirement:

When the List Report table is grouped, the system must display an aggregation subtotal row for each group (group-level total), not only a grand total.

However, RAP currently does not allow analytical annotations or analytical CDS entities to be used with transactional behavior. Because of this limitation:

  • We cannot enable annotations such as
    • @analytics.query: true
    • @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
    • @Aggregation.default: #SUM
  • RAP services cannot perform backend aggregations or expose group-level totals.
  • As a result, neither grand totals nor group-level totals can appear in the List Report.

Observed Limitation:

Backend (RAP):

  • RAP business objects with behavior definitions do not support analytical CDS views.
  • Aggregations and group-by queries are not supported in RAP OData V2 or OData V4.
  • Analytical annotations cannot be used on projection or interface views participating in RAP.

entry.title: RAP‑Based Service Does Not Support Aggregation Totals with Filters and Group‑By
entry.content:
We are implementing a Fiori Elements List Report using a RAP‑based OData service (OData V2 or V4).
The business requirement is to show aggregated totals (SUM) for multiple numeric columns. These totals must update dynamically whenever:

  • Filters are applied
  • Group By is enabled
  • Group levels expand/collapse
  • Sorting or table personalization is applied

    Most Important Requirement:

    When the List Report table is grouped, the system must display an aggregation subtotal row for each group (group-level total), not only a grand total.

    However, RAP currently does not allow analytical annotations or analytical CDS entities to be used with transactional behavior. Because of this limitation:

    • We cannot enable annotations such as
      • @analytical.query: true
      • @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
      • @Aggregation.default: #SUM
      • RAP services cannot perform backend aggregations or expose group-level totals.
      • As a result, neither grand totals nor group-level totals can appear in the List Report.

entry.title: RAP + Fiori elements: How do I show hierarchical data inside a Fiori Elements Object Page
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

Actually I have created a RAP OData v4 in SAP S/HANA on-premise with a Fiori elements application. I am trying to display the data in my object page in hierarchical way. I have tried with define hierarchy view and the annotation @odata.hierarchy.recursiveHierarchy, but my system version does not support it. 
Does anyone have a solution to show hierarchical data inside a Fiori Elements Object Page?

Thank you,

entry.title: how to trigger handler class read method in RAP OData V4 Web API?
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

Good day.

Well, I have a requirement, existing material data coming from third party system to CPI to S/4 HANA MDG and need to create change request and approve it.

So created a RAP service, Table , CDS view , service definition with binding type OData V4 Web API along with behavior definition/implementation In the handler class, defined the methods modify and read. I just want to see if read method is called and data filled. So i would like to know how i can execute/debug the handler class read method.

How can i do the GET call using GW client?

Service URL :  /sap/opu/odata4/sap/xxx_xx_xxx_sb/srvd_a2x/sap/xxxx_xx_xxxx_s/0001/

xxx_xx_xxx_sb -  Service binding         xxxx_xx_xxxx_s  - Service definition

 

 

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.

entry.title: Different Header in XML schema based interface with gateway in sap s4 hana ADOBE forms
entry.content:
Hi

I am using Master form template to display logo and fotter and content form template for content my requirement is to have 2 different header fields in first page and second page. i.e after logo i want 5 fields in first page and 2 fields in second page and so on.  Could you let me know how to achieve different headers using XML schema based interface in sap s4 hana 

Thanks

entry.title: Timeout in RAP Action
entry.content:
I have a Rap app with an action in a table that is partially executed on up to 100,000 items. Processing then takes place in the backend for each location. Since this process takes a certain amount of time per item, it can take several hours for the entire logic to be completed. As a result, the process aborts in the frontend with a timeout.

I solved the problem by running the processing in an RFC module in the background. The customer does not want to extend the session length that causes the timeout. My question now is whether there are other alternatives to solve this problem?

entry.title: Exception aggregation steps and #NOP together (ABAP RAP Analytical Query)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to define an analytical query in ABAP RAP and I am struggling to have #NOP operation and exception aggregation steps working together in one query.

For simplicity, let's say I have a cube with the following properties: Document, Document Item, Sales and Price. With this simple model, I can define aggregation #SUM for Sales and aggregation #NOP for Price. Let's say I have the following data in my cube:\

Document A, 10, 20, 10
Document A, 20, 40, 10
Document B, 10, 100, 20
Document B, 20, 200, 25

When I ask to get aggregated records by Document and show measures Sales and Price, I get the following two records:

Document A, 60, 10
Document B, 300, <null>

This is all great and what I exactly want to see. The sales get aggregated and Price shows a value only if all items have the same price. Otherwise it does not show the value.

The problem is that my data model is more complex. Let's say each document can be tagged with one or more tags. My cube also has additional attribute Tag. I want provide flexibility to users to have aggregation per tag. Let's say I have the following data in my cube:

Tag One, Document A, 10, 20, 10
Tag One, Document A, 20, 40, 20
Tag Two, Document A, 10, 20, 10
Tag Two, Document A, 20, 40, 20

I have one document, with different prices on each item and the document is associated with two tags. When I ask to get aggregated records by Document and show measures Sales and Price, I get the following record:

Document A, 120, <null>

The aggregation for Price works fine (it shows null as there are different prices for document items). But the aggregation for Sales is double counting as the document has two tags. This is clearly wrong. To fix this problem, I introduced the exception aggregation steps for measure Sales.

@AnalyticsDetails.exceptionAggregationSteps: [ { exceptionAggregationBehavior: #SUM,
exceptionAggregationElements: [ 'Document' ] } ]
Sales

When I ask to get the aggregate records by Document and show measures Sales and Price, I get the following record:

Document A, 60, 10

The aggregation for Sales works again and it does not double count Sales anymore. But the aggregation #NOP stopped working and it shows the value from the first item. I would like to avoid this. The aggregatiobn #NOP is not supported for exceptionAggregationBehavior.

Is there a way how to make #NOP and exception aggregation steps work together? Or is there another way how to model this type of the scenario where the same document can be present multiple times and the summation should prevent any double counting?

The best workaround I could come up with is that I defined two new measures MinPrice and MaxPrice with the corresponding aggregations #MIN and #MAN. Then I defined a new measure with the following formula.

@Aggregation.default: #FORMULA
@EndUserText.label: 'Test'
@AnalyticsDetails.query:{ decimals: 2}
case when $projection.minprice = $projection.maxprice then get_numeric_value(MinPrice) else 0 end as Test,

This almost works as desired. If minimal and maximal prices are the same, it shows the price. Otherwise it shows 0. Here I would prefer null instead of 0. But there are other things that I do not like about this workaround. The hard coded decimals are not nice. And it means that for each measure like Price, I need to define additional 2 measures Min and Max. I have more than 10 fields like this so it quickly gets out of hand. The last concern is about performance of this workaround.

Any suggestions how to achieve this requirement?

Thanks

entry.title: Dynamic programming in RAP for excel upload
entry.content:
Hello All, 

We have a requirement to have a single interface in RAP, which can upload excel data to around 30 tables that we select via drop-down or screen. 

In the report program, we have an option upload excel to tables with dynamic programming with minimum efforts. We were achieving this by maintaining the tables in tvarvc, using the system classes and use Excel upload to populate the tables, and this would rarely require any enhancement.

Is there any way that we can do the same in RAP framework, as creating i view, c view. Meta data extension and behaviour definition for 30 tables is a tedious task.

Regards 

Naga

entry.title: Unable to update "Your Reference" (VBKD-IHREZ) using standard api API_CUSTOMER_RETURN extension.
entry.content:
Hello,

The business requirement is to use API_CUSTOMER_RETURN to create return orders in S/4 (Private cloud).  There return orders are created referencing multiple invoices in the satellite system.  Reference Invoice Numbers should be stored in "Your Reference" (VBKD-IHREZ) field at the header and line item levels in S/4.  VBKD-IHREZ is not exposed in the standard API.

Extending CDS views A_CustomerReturn and A_CustomerReturnItem with CorrespncExternalReference field only reads VBKD-IHREZ in the get operation.

I am unable to save the values with post operation.  Has anybody implemented this?  Please share the details.

Thanks

Lokesh

entry.title: How to extend API_CUSTOMER_RETURN with VBKD-IHREZ for CRUD?
entry.content:
The business requirement is to use API_CUSTOMER_RETURN to create return orders in S/4 (Private cloud). There return orders are created referencing multiple invoices in the satellite system. Reference Invoice Numbers should be stored in "Your Reference" (VBKD-IHREZ) field at the header and line item levels in S/4. Standard API doesn't expose VBKD-IHREZ.


Extending CDS views A_CustomerReturn and A_CustomerReturnItem with CorrespncExternalReference field only reads VBKD-IHREZ in the get operation.

I am unable to save the values with post operation. Has anybody implemented this?  Please share the details.

 

Thanks

Lokesh

entry.title: Fiori changed value to appear when deleting table entry
entry.content:
In S4HANA Public Cloud, I have a custom app using RAP that has Gross Amount field.

I  wanted to make the Gross Amount value updated whenever I change the Unit Price in the Conditions Table.

Gross Amount is part of one entity while the Conditions Table is another.

When I add a new entry and enter a Unit Price value, the Gross Amount value updates. But when I delete an entry having a Unit Price, the Gross Amount doesnt update.

I've already applied side effects and determinations in my behavior definition to trigger calculation during delete and reflect changes in the Gross Amount. I checked the draft table and the Gross Amount is updated but the value doesnt change in the UI. 

determination CalcGrossAmtByDelete on modify { delete; }  
side effects
  {
    field UnitPrice
    affects
        field _Entity1.GrossAmount;

    $self
    affects
        field _Entity1.GrossAmount;
  }

entry.title: Odata V4 service binding in RAP not showing CREATE button in the preview App
entry.content: Odata V4 service binding in RAP not showing CREATE button in the preview App but it is showing when we do preview with Odata v2 in service binding in the SAP BTP ABAP cloud trial.

entry.title: How to use fields of associated consumption view (not composition) in RAP root view's metadata ext.
entry.content:
Hi All,

  So here is the scenario.  

  I have 1) Table T1-> CDS ZI_T1 -> CDS ZC_T1 -> MetadataExtension (ZMDE_T1)

              2) Table T2-> CDS ZI_T2 -> CDS ZC_T2 -> MetadataExtension (ZMDE_T2)

Now T2 is not composition/child of T1 , but just an association. So we have ZI_T1 having association with ZI_T2 and exposed the association _ZT2.

Now for the List report UI in RAP , we have fields of ZC_T1 shown in List Page and I want when user goes to object page , it should show fields of _ZT2 in a table (UI.lineitem)

I have created Metadata extensions and facets on top of both the consumption views.

Challenge here is since my MDE of ZC_T2 will not be accessible in MDE of ZC_T1 to navigate during object page , since there is no direct association which exists between ZC_T1 and ZC_T2.

So i have to forcefully change my association  in ZI_T1 to point to ZC_T2 (instead of ZI_T2) and then the UI works in object page as expected.

But problem with this approach is , 1) its not correct as per SAP standard to associate an interface view with consumption view.

Also  2) its not recommended as per standards to create metadata extension on top of interface view (for T2) as it should always be consumption view.

Now I am unable to achieve my requirement without breaking one of the above coding standards.

Please suggest
